creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: The problem is that your code is not calling jailparam_import() or jailparam_get() (with some JID specified in the parameters).  In this case, there is no value to export, i.e., jd_value == NULL and we trigger a null pointer dereference.  But, the library should probably check for this case and return an error instead of crashing.
